chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.D-545 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE___________ 1. For orders on office objection “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 25-06-2025 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ali Memon, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbassi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh along with Ayaz Hussain Mashori Assistant Commissioner Khanpur and Aftab Ahmed Solangi Mukhtiarkar Khanpur. ----------------------- Pursuant to order dated 04-06-2025, Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Khanpur, and Mukhtiarkar Revenue Taluka Khanpur, are present and submit that the process for initiating demarcation of the subject land has commenced. They further stated that notices are required to be issued to the concerned parties and Survey Superintendent Larkana. It is stated that upon receipt of the challan from the office of Mukhtiarkar, the petitioner shall deposit the requisite demarcation charges, where after the demarcation will be conducted in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied on the statement of the respondent No.01 and 02 seeks disposal of the instant petition. Petition stands disposed of, directing the respondents No.01 and 02 to decide the application pertaining to demarcation as available at page No.11 of the petition in accordance with law, after adopting the procedure prescribed under the Sindh Land Revenue Act, and affording all concerned parties an opportunity of hearing within 30 days. JUDGE JUDGE Asghar/P.A
